title: Armor HUD++
description: Minimalist widget to display your armor and their durability.
body:
### Armor HUD++

Minecraft mod that adds a clean and lightweight HUD widget that shows your current armor directly on your screen.

Armor HUD++ features a minimalist vanilla-style design that blends naturally with Minecraft while staying simple and useful. Keep track of your equipped armor at a glance without opening your inventory. The HUD is fully client-side, lightweight, and customizable with an easy edit mode for moving and resizing.

**Keybinds**

- Check Gallery Section for Keybinds

**Features**

- Minimal vanilla-like design
- Lightweight and client-side
- Draggable HUD positioning
- Adjustable size
- Clean and simple interface
- Easy edit mode customization
